arts.ttl: Arsenal could be player’s ‘next home’ as Gunners prepare offer – Exit will represent capital gain for club
arts.sum: Piotr Zielinski joined Inter Milan during the last summer transfer window but his situation is attracting the attention of Arsenal. He arrived at Inter on a free transfer after his contract expired with Napoli, but he’s had a frustrating season. He is currently out injured, with the Poland international only playing 22 Serie A games.
